content.en:
Ye Tian frowned, he didn't expect that he would attract so many Eternal Controllers.

Needless to say, it must be because of these Five Elements Boundary Crystals in his hands.

It seemed that the value of the Five Elements Boundary Crystal was even higher than he imagined, otherwise it would not have attracted so many Eternal Controllers.

These Eternal Masters originally wanted to capture Ye Tian directly, after all, Ye Tian had at least more than a hundred Five Elements Boundary Crystals on his body, and if he only had one Five Elements Boundary Crystal, he would not be able to attract them.

However, more than a hundred dollars, the attraction is too much.

However, when they took a closer look at Ye Tian, their expressions suddenly changed.

"The Mark of the Ten Elements Ancestor!"

The Ten Elements Ancestors are not something they can offend, they are also ant-like existences for the Ten Elements Ancestors.

Even if there are Eternal Masters who don't know the Ten Elements Ancestor, or say they haven't heard of it, but they sense the mark of the Ten Elements Ancestor on Ye Tian's body, they also know that it is a great existence that they can't reach.

Therefore, they did not dare to do it.

However, it's all here, so you can't just go straight away.

So, an eternal master said: "Xiaoyou should have a lot of Five Elements Boundary Crystals, I want to trade some Five Elements Boundary Crystals, and the price is absolutely satisfactory to Xiaoyou." "

"I also want to trade the Five Elements Boundary Crystal with Xiaoyou!"

Said another Eternal Master.

Seeing that these eternal masters were all about to trade with themselves, Ye Tian smiled inwardly.

Naturally, the Eternal Controller would not be so easy to speak, it was nothing more than that he had the mark of a great being on his body, and they were extremely jealous, so they did not snatch the Five Elements Boundary Crystal from him.

Otherwise, even if there was an ordinary Eternal Controller standing behind him, he would not be able to keep the Five Elements Boundary Crystal on his body.

Ye Tian had no fear, so he didn't worry about it.

He said directly, "This is my deal with a certain Eternal Master, so I can't trade with you. "

The Eternal Masters were not angry, and after a few kind words, they departed one by one.

And Ye Tian left here alone and went to the place where he came.

Void Zone.

One of the incarnations of the white-bearded old man was still in Xuyang Mountain, so Ye Tian came here directly to inform the white-bearded old man that his doppelganger was about to return from the eleventh boundary river, and asked the white-bearded old man to pick him up.

So, the white-bearded old man went to the No. 11 Boundary River as soon as possible.

In the Origin Void Circle, the white-bearded old man came here, and immediately tore through the barrier of time and space, and entered the eleventh boundary river.

Soon, he sensed Ye Tian's position, and immediately returned to the Origin Void Circle with Ye Tian.

And at the moment when the white-bearded old man had just left, time and space were distorted, and the will of the eternal masters descended here.

"It should have been the eternal master of a certain boundary river just now~. "

"I guess I'm leaving, so I don't need to care. "

"As long as you're not here to cause trouble, you don't need to worry about it!"

Soon, the will of these eternal masters was dispersed

......

Thirteenth Boundary River.

Ye Tian and the white-bearded old man are back.

"Endless Lord, how many Five Elements Boundary Crystals have been found, it doesn't matter if the number is smaller, I can communicate with the Realm Control Refiner, and maybe I can also ask him to help refine them. The white-bearded old man said.

"Old man with white beard, don't worry, I have obtained a lot of Five Elements Boundary Crystals, the number is more than 200, and both of us can find him to refine and control the Realm Soldiers. Ye Tian said.

"What, more than 200 Five Elements Realm Crystal ???"

The white-bearded old man was shocked.

Ye Tian didn't go to the Five Elements Domain Sea for a long time, and in such a short time, Ye Tian found more than 200 Five Elements Boundary Crystals?

Is the difficulty of finding the Five Elements Boundary Crystal so low?

But what he knew, it was very difficult to find a piece of the Five Elements Boundary Crystal, and in the Thirteenth Realm, a piece of the Five Elements Boundary Crystal was even enough to make a half-step Eternal Controller pay a small half of his worth.

If a half-step Eternal Master could easily find the Five Elements Boundary Crystal by going to the Five Elements Domain Sea, then it would not have such a high value.

"How did you find so many Five Elements Boundary Crystals?"

The white-bearded old man asked suspiciously.

"It's just luck!" Ye Tian said with a smile.

"Endless Lord, to be honest, I do want the Five Elements Boundary Crystal, but the value of the Five Elements Boundary Crystal is too high, and I can't ask for your Five Elements Boundary Crystal for nothing, so let's take a treasure and exchange it with you!"

As he spoke, the white-bearded old man took out a treasure.

This was a shattered stone tablet, which looked very ordinary, but Ye Tian took a closer look and was immediately shocked.

"Isn't this a fragment of the Boundary River Monument?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!" the white-bearded old man nodded, "Every boundary river will give birth to a boundary river monument in a long time, and this boundary river monument is a fragment of the space boundary river monument, I also obtained it by accident, it is because of this boundary river monument that I can grow so fast." However, I have now broken through to the realm of the Eternal Master, and this fragment of the Boundary River Monument will not help me much, so I will give it to you. "

"Speaking of which, I've earned it, the Five Elements Boundary Crystal doesn't help me much now, but this Boundary River Monument Fragment helps me even more!" Ye Tian said with a smile.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian completed the transaction with the white-bearded old man and handed over a hundred Five Elements Boundary Crystals to him.

After that, the two of them went to the Eternal Master to create the Realm Master.

No. 13 Boundary River, Kongtong Holy City.

Ye Tian and the white-bearded old man arrived here, and what they were looking for was the Copper Hammer Master, one of the three major masters of Kongtong Holy City.

The strength of the Copper Hammer Controller is not very strong among the Eternal Controllers, because he only delves into refining weapons and is good at crafting Realm Masters, and he doesn't know how many Masters he has created for other Eternal Masters.

It is precisely because he helps other Eternal Masters create Realm Masters that he has a wide network of contacts, and many of them will give him face.

Therefore, no one will embarrass the Copper Hammer Commander.

Soon, the white-bearded old man took Ye Tian to the Copper Hammer Mountain where the copper hammer master was located, and the copper hammer master was in this copper hammer mountain.

At this moment, there are more than a dozen incarnations of the Eternal Masters waiting here, all of them have come to find the Copper Hammer Masters to forge the Realm Masters, but all of them need to wait in line.

"The master of the copper hammer, we brought the Five Elements Boundary Crystal, and asked the master of the copper hammer to create a control realm soldier for (Li Li Hao)!"

The white-bearded old man shouted.

Abrupt.

The incarnation of the Copper Hammer Keeper descended and glanced at the white-bearded old man.

"Whitebeard Controller, I told you before that I would have to have 100 Five Elements Boundary Crystals before I would create a Realm Control Soldier for you. The Hammer Keeper said.

Then.

The white-bearded old man took out a hundred pieces of Five Elements Realm Crystal Attack.

"Collected a hundred pieces of Five Elements Boundary !!Crystals so quickly" The Copper Hammer Controller was extremely surprised, if he went to collect it, there was no way to collect it so quickly, because he was not the only one who needed the Eternal Controller of the Five Elements Boundary Crystals!

Suddenly.

Ye Tian also took out a hundred pieces of Five Elements Boundary Crystals and said, "Copper Hammer Master, I have also collected a hundred Five Elements Boundary Crystals, and I also asked the Copper Hammer Controller to help create a Realm Control Soldier." "

Seeing this, the Copper Hammer Controller was overjoyed: "Okay, I'll help you build a Realm Control Soldier for free, and I will also pay for your Five Elements Boundary Crystal!"
